title: hieracium gandogeri
intro: Hieracium gandogeri, also known as Mouse-ear Hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium gandogeri include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of arthritis. Herbal preparations of Hieracium gandogeri can be found in the form of tinctures, infusions, and creams, which are used topically to treat various skin conditions.
